- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project type is React app for Merchant Status Tracker interface.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Used Vite to create React project structure.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented login form and transaction query interface with API integration.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed, build checked, dev server running.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Dev server started with npm run dev.

- [x] Launch the Project
	App running at http://localhost:5174/

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md exists, copilot-instructions.md updated.
